languages.text: "Искупление для одного — дело многогранное. Я делаю то, что нужно. И к Ведке у меня претензий нет. До вашего прибытия вообще все это было только поводом языки почесать. К тому же, я племянник Иждрига, он меня вырастил после смерти родителей. Вот уж отвернуться от него было бы как у братьев-генералов".

"Atonement for the one is a complicated thing. I do what needs to be done. And I have no complaints about Vedka. Before your arrival, all this was just an excuse to babble. Besides, Izdrig's my uncle. He raised me after my parents died. Turning on him would be as bad as what the Brother-Generals did."
languages.original_text: "Искупление для одного — дело многогранное. Я делаю то, что нужно. И к Ведке у меня претензий нет. До вашего прибытия вообще все это было только поводом языки почесать. К тому же, я племянник Иждрига, он меня вырастил после смерти родителей. Вот уж отвернуться от него было бы как у братьев-генералов".

traits.locale_text: "Atonement for the one is a complicated thing. I do what needs to be done. And I have no complaints about Vedka. Before your arrival, all this was just an excuse to babble. Izdrig also happens to be my uncle. He raised me after my parents died. Turning on him would be as bad as what the Brother-Generals did."

"Atonement for the one is a complicated thing. I do what needs to be done. And I have no complaints about Vedka. Before your arrival, all this was just an excuse to babble. Besides, Izdrig's my uncle. He raised me after my parents died. Turning on him would be as bad as what the Brother-Generals did."

"Freedom for the one is a complicated thing. I do what needs to be done. And I have no complaints about Vedka as commander. Before your arrival, all this was just an excuse to argue before bed and a way to pass the time. Izdrig also happens to be my uncle. He raised me after my parents died. It wouldn't be very filial of me to turn my back on him."

Izdrig also happens to be my uncle. He raised me after my parents died. Turning on him would be as bad as what the Brother-Generals did."

Besides, Izdrig's my uncle. He raised me after my parents died. Turning on him would be as bad as what the Brother-Generals did."

Besides, Izdrig's my uncle. He raised me after my parents died. Turning on him would be as bad as what the Brother-Generals did."

languages.text: 「自由は複雑な問題だ。必要なことをする。ヴェドカの指揮には不満はない。君が来るまでは、これは寝る前の言い争いの口実で、暇つぶしだった。イズドリーグは叔父で、両親が死んだ後、育ててくれた。彼を裏切ることは、孝行に反するだろう」
languages.original_text: "Freedom for the one is a complicated thing. I do what needs to be done. And I have no complaints about Vedka as commander. Before your arrival, all this was just an excuse to argue before bed and a way to pass the time. Izdrig also happens to be my uncle. He raised me after my parents died. It wouldn't be very filial of me to turn my back on him."

languages.text: "Sona kalana kefaret, karmaşık bir şeydir. Yapılması gerekeni yaparım. Vedka'yla ilgili hiçbir şikâyetim yok. Siz gelmeden önce tüm bunlar laflama konusundan ibaretti. Ayrıca İzdrig amcam olur. Annem ve babam öldükten sonra beni o büyüttü. Ona sırt çevirmek, Rahip Generallerin yaptığı kadar kötü olurdu."
languages.original_text: "Atonement for the one is a complicated thing. I do what needs to be done. And I have no complaints about Vedka. Before your arrival, all this was just an excuse to babble. Besides, Izdrig's my uncle. He raised me after my parents died. Turning on him would be as bad as what the Brother-Generals did."

traits.locale_text: "Sona kalana kefaret, karmaşık bir şeydir. Yapılması gerekeni yaparım. Vedka'yla ilgili hiçbir şikâyetim yok. Siz gelmeden önce tüm bunlar laflama konusundan ibaretti. Ayrıca İzdrig amcam olur. Annem ve babam öldükten sonra beni o büyüttü. Ona sırt çevirmek, Rahip Generallerin yaptığı kadar kötü olurdu."

languages.text: “‘一人之赎’是一个很复杂的概念。我只管做自己该做的事。我对薇德卡并没有什么不满。在您来之前，这些争论不过是发牢骚的由头罢了。再说，伊兹德里格是我叔叔。我父母去世后，是他把我养大的。要是跟他对着干，那不就跟那些将军兄弟一样恶劣了嘛。”
languages.original_text: "Atonement for the one is a complicated thing. I do what needs to be done. And I have no complaints about Vedka. Before your arrival, all this was just an excuse to babble. Besides, Izdrig's my uncle. He raised me after my parents died. Turning on him would be as bad as what the Brother-Generals did."

traits.locale_text: “‘一人之赎’是一个很复杂的概念。我只管做自己该做的事。我对薇德卡并没有什么不满。在您来之前，这些争论不过是发牢骚的由头罢了。再说，伊兹德里格是我叔叔。我父母去世后，是他把我养大的。要是跟他对着干，那不就跟那些将军兄弟一样恶劣了嘛。”

languages.text: "Sühne für den Einzelnen ist eine komplizierte Sache. Ich tue, was getan werden muss. Und ich kann mich über Vedka nicht beschweren. Vor Eurer Ankunft war das alles nur ein Grund zum Plaudern. Aber nicht für Izdrig, meinen Onkel. Er hat mich nach dem Tod meiner Eltern aufgezogen. Mich gegen ihn zu stellen, wäre genauso übel wie das, was die Bruder-Generäle getan haben."
languages.original_text: "Atonement for the one is a complicated thing. I do what needs to be done. And I have no complaints about Vedka. Before your arrival, all this was just an excuse to babble. Besides, Izdrig's my uncle. He raised me after my parents died. Turning on him would be as bad as what the Brother-Generals did."

traits.locale_text: "Sühne für den Einzelnen ist eine komplizierte Sache. Ich tue, was getan werden muss. Und ich kann mich über Vedka nicht beschweren. Vor Eurer Ankunft war das alles nur ein Grund zum Plaudern. Aber nicht für Izdrig, meinen Onkel. Er hat mich nach dem Tod meiner Eltern aufgezogen. Mich gegen ihn zu stellen, wäre genauso übel wie das, was die Bruder-Generäle getan haben."

languages.text: « Le principe de l'expiation pour un seul est assez compliqué. Je fais simplement ce qui est nécessaire. Et je n'ai rien à reprocher à Vedka. Avant votre arrivée, tout ça n'était qu'un prétexte pour bavarder. Il faut également savoir qu'Izdrig est mon oncle. C'est lui qui m'a élevé après la mort de mes parents. Si je lui tournais le dos, je ne vaudrais pas mieux que les frères-généraux. »
languages.original_text: "Atonement for the one is a complicated thing. I do what needs to be done. And I have no complaints about Vedka. Before your arrival, all this was just an excuse to babble. Besides, Izdrig's my uncle. He raised me after my parents died. Turning on him would be as bad as what the Brother-Generals did."

traits.locale_text: « Le principe de l'expiation pour un seul est assez compliqué. Je fais simplement ce qui est nécessaire. Et je n'ai rien à reprocher à Vedka. Avant votre arrivée, tout ça n'était qu'un prétexte pour bavarder. Il faut également savoir qu'Izdrig est mon oncle. C'est lui qui m'a élevé après la mort de mes parents. Si je lui tournais le dos, je ne vaudrais pas mieux que les frères-généraux. »

languages.text: «La expiación para el último es un asunto complicado. Hago lo que hay que hacer y no tengo quejas sobre Vedka. Antes de su llegada, esto no era más que una excusa para charlar. Además, Izdrig es mi tío. Me crio tras la muerte de mis padres. Traicionarlo sería tan terrible como lo que hicieron los hermanos generales».
languages.original_text: "Atonement for the one is a complicated thing. I do what needs to be done. And I have no complaints about Vedka. Before your arrival, all this was just an excuse to babble. Besides, Izdrig's my uncle. He raised me after my parents died. Turning on him would be as bad as what the Brother-Generals did."
